title: xanthisma spinulosum var. gooddingii
intro: Xanthisma spinulosum var. gooddingii, commonly known as Goodding's xanthisma, is a rare and endangered flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. It is a shrubby perennial that belongs to the daisy family and is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. Herbal preparations of Goodding's xanthisma include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
